diagnostics.consequence: Synthesis-planning evaluation outcomes may vary by labeler, so downstream decisions based on those labels can inherit evaluator subjectivity rather than a stable objective signal.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

diagnostics.statement: The synthesis-planning labeling mechanism is explicitly subjective and may differ between labelers.

diagnostics.consequence: Claims about autonomous experimental operation need boundary qualifications: the system avoided human decision-making, but physical plate movement was still manual.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.

diagnostics.statement: The reported experimental setup was not fully automated even though the source says no human decision-making was involved.

diagnostics.consequence: External auditability of the reported mechanisms and results is limited until full data, code, and prompts are released.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

diagnostics.statement: The packet reports delayed release of data, code, and prompts.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Report inter-labeler agreement and adjudication error analysis for 100% of evaluated synthesis-planning labels used in later decisions.
success_check.evidence_needed: Labeler identities or roles, per-item labels, adjudication records, agreement metrics, and analysis of disagreements.
success_check.observable: Evaluator subjectivity is quantified and its effect on synthesis-planning decisions is reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Boundary documentation accounts for every human action in the experimental workflow and distinguishes physical intervention from decision-making.
success_check.evidence_needed: Workflow trace listing automated steps, manual steps, human inputs, and whether each could affect experimental choices or outcomes.
success_check.observable: The system boundary for automation claims is explicit and auditable.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: At least one independent reviewer receives sufficient non-public or redacted materials to verify the reported evaluation mechanisms and key experimental claims.
success_check.evidence_needed: Independent review attestation, reviewed artifact inventory, redaction rationale, and reproducibility or audit findings.
success_check.observable: Independent evidence compensates for delayed public release of data, code, and prompts.

memo: Implemented mechanisms reported in the packet include Planner ingestion of command outputs as later input messages, documentation consultation after an incorrect OT-2 method name followed by protocol correction, subjective synthesis-planning labels, and iterative optimization measured through normalized advantage values that increase over time and are interpreted as reuse of obtained information for more specific reactivity guidance. The packet also reports physical-world experimental capability, no internet access for one liquid-handler investigation, manual plate movement despite no human decision-making, and delayed release of data, code, and prompts. Novelty/prior-art assessment, probabilistic calibration, independent laboratory replication, and formal proof-checker validation are not reported in the supplied excerpts or packet instructions.
